hazards.warning: LITHIUM BATTERY DETECTED. Do not puncture, bend, or short circuit. Fire hazard! Disconnect battery connector first before working.
hazards.action: Locate and disconnect the battery connector immediately.

hazards.warning: MAINS VOLTAGE DETECTED. Risk of electrocution. Ensure device is unplugged. Capacitors may hold charge even when unplugged.
hazards.action: Unplug device. Discharge large capacitors with a resistor before touching.

hazards.warning: LASER RADIATION. Avoid direct eye exposure. Do not look into the beam.
hazards.action: Wear appropriate safety glasses if the laser is powered.

hazards.warning: HOT SURFACE. Components may be extremely hot.
